evals.name: executive-summary-deck
evals.prompt: I have quarterly metrics to present to the leadership team: revenue up 18%, customer churn down to 2.1%, NPS increased from 42 to 67, and 3 new enterprise deals closed. Create a short executive deck summarizing these results with recommendations for next quarter.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx file built from a JSON manifest using the Executive Summary or Quarterly Review archetype with metrics slides and midnight-exec or midnight palette

assertions.text: Archetype selection is offered to the user

evals.name: architecture-review-with-pngs
evals.prompt: I have 3 Excalidraw PNGs showing our current architecture, proposed architecture, and migration plan. Here they are: current-arch.png, proposed-arch.png, migration-plan.png. I also have a markdown document with the review notes. Create an architecture review presentation from these.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx file with diagram and diagram_full slides referencing the provided images, using the charcoal palette

assertions.text: Contains diagram or diagram_full slide types

evals.name: incident-post-mortem
evals.prompt: We had a production outage last Tuesday from 14:00 to 17:30 UTC. The payment service went down due to a database connection pool exhaustion. 12,000 users were affected, estimated revenue impact $45K. Root cause was a missing connection timeout on a new query added in last week's deploy. I need a post-mortem presentation for the engineering all-hands.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx file with timeline-oriented structure using the cherry-bold palette

evals.name: comparison-deck
evals.prompt: I need to compare 3 database options for our new project: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, and DynamoDB. Compare them on cost, scalability, query flexibility, team expertise, and managed service availability. This will go to the architecture review board.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx file with comparison slides using the ocean-gradient palette

evals.name: training-deck
evals.prompt: I'm creating onboarding material for new engineers joining our team. I need a training deck that covers our development workflow, CI/CD pipeline, service architecture, and debugging procedures. I have architecture diagrams and pipeline flowcharts to include. It should be comprehensive enough for someone to get up to speed in their first week.
evals.expected_output: A .pptx file using the forest-moss palette with 12+ slides and diagram slides for visual walkthroughs
